fields.audience: repository maintainer, contest reviewer, and the user directing the controlled run
fields.purpose: handoff and audit of benchmark trust repair
fields.detail_level: high enough to enter pregoal/orchestration and code execution without inventing missing requirement meaning
fields.evidence_reference_needs: Every final claim must cite run-local evidence or repository file paths.
fields.machine_readable_needs: requirements.control.json must be valid JSON and consumable by the cybernetic pregoal toolchain.
fields.acceptance_condition: The user can approve the compact commitment and pass the run directory directly to orchestrating/pregoal.
